analysis —
law a crop plan is the recorded, re-runnable backward computation from a sales/[[yield]] goal to what/how-much/when/where (demand → units → bed-feet → [[seed]]); actuals feed back to refine next year's coefficients, so it is versioned, never a one-shot.
